summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Epicenter Hi-Fi music player. All major navigation and UI features are working correctly. Queue functionality, Mi Música folders, and DSP/EQ controls are properly implemented. Minor issue found with volume slider behavior.

ui_bugs.issue: Volume slider does not update value when changed - stays at 0 even when set to different values

passed_tests: Player view shows 'Ahora Suena' with 'Cola (0)' button
Queue toggle button works - shows/hides queue inline
Empty queue displays 'Cola vacía' message correctly
Navigation tabs work perfectly (Ahora, Mi Música, EQ, DSP)
Mi Música shows three folders: Canciones, Artistas, Álbumes
Each folder has beautiful gradient icons (pink-orange, purple-blue, green-teal)
EQ view shows 12-band equalizer with frequency labels (32Hz-16kHz)
EQ ON/OFF switch present and functional
DSP view shows all 5 knobs (SWEEP, WIDTH, INTENSITY, BALANCE, VOLUME)
DSP ON/OFF switch with LED indicator works correctly
DSP shows current values: SWEEP 45Hz, WIDTH 50%, INTENSITY 50%, BALANCE 50%, VOLUME 100%
All data-testid attributes present for testing (player-view, toggle-queue-btn)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix volume slider functionality - the slider does not update its value when changed, always stays at 0. This may affect volume control during playback.
